title: That unless a man have been baptized and born again, he cannot attain unto the kingdom of God.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That unless a man have been baptized and born again, he cannot attain unto the kingdom of God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the Gospel according to John: “Except a man be born again of water and the Spirit, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: For that which is born of the flesh is flesh; and that which is born of the Spirit is spirit.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the same place: “Unless ye eat the flesh of the Son of man, and drink His blood, ye shall not have life in you.”
